name: GD Highway Sync Tap
description: Emits the level playhead over a localhost WebSocket (live) or dumps per-tick physics to JSONL (capture). Read-only companion for the GD Note Highway overlay.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: live = stream the playhead over WebSocket for the overlay. capture = dump physics telemetry to a file while replaying a macro.

port.name: WebSocket port
port.description: Localhost port the renderer connects to (live mode).

capture-dir.name: Capture directory
capture-dir.description: Where to write <level>.telemetry.jsonl in capture mode. Empty = the mod save dir.
